title: Trinidad and Tobago Application Form for Passport (Applicants 16 Years and Over, First Issue)
description: The Immigration Division (Ministry of National Security)'s "Application Form for Trinidad and Tobago Passport (Applicants 16 Years and Over)", distributed for first-time Machine Readable Passport (MRP) applicants by the Ministry of Foreign and CARICOM Affairs (MFCA) for use through Trinidad and Tobago's overseas Embassies, High Commissions, and Consulates — per MFCA's own "Passports and Citizenship" service page, overseas applications are forwarded to the Immigration Division for processing. Opens Trinidad and Tobago as the registry's 91st jurisdiction (GOV-4568, "GovSchema Standard Research"), scouted fresh this cycle after Bolivia's five remaining verticals (Business Formation, Visa, Passport, DMV, National ID) were all independently re-confirmed dead-end/weak (Fundempresa's domain has lapsed to a parking page; migracion.gob.bo is a pure Angular SPA with no static form fallback; SEGIP's licence/cédula pages are explicitly in-person/biometric-only). A parallel scouting pass across Guatemala, Trinidad and Tobago, and Mauritius found Trinidad and Tobago the strongest candidate, with four independently byte-verified STRONG verticals on official .gov.tt domains (Passport, DMV, Business Formation, Taxes); this schema authors the first of those four. This schema does not submit the application itself; the live source is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Trinidad and Tobago or its Ministry of National Security.

authority.name: Immigration Division, Ministry of National Security

source.documentRef: Application Form for Trinidad and Tobago Passport (Applicants 16 Years and Over) — 1st issue MRP; no printed form number on the specimen itself

verification.notes: See VERIFICATION.md for the full write-up: source fetch/hash, extraction method (including a disclosed canvas-rendering limitation), document structure, the citizenshipBasis discriminator, the marriedWomen sex-gated section, and disclosed scope decisions.

steps.title: Section 3 — Permission from Parent/Legal Guardian for Applicants Under 18 Years of Age
Section 5 — Citizen of Trinidad and Tobago By
Section 6 — Trinidad and Tobago Passport(s) Previously

fields.name: maidenName
fields.label: Maiden Name
fields.description: Applicable if the applicant is or was a married woman, per this registry's standard reading of a "Maiden Name" line with no printed qualifier on this specimen.

fields.name: formerNameSurname
fields.label: Former Name: Surname
fields.description: Applicable if the applicant has previously used a different surname (e.g. following a legal name change), not printed as conditional on any other field.

fields.name: mothersMaidenNameSurname
fields.label: Mother's Maiden Name: Surname
fields.description: The source prints only a Surname line under this heading, no First Name line.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital Status
fields.sourceRef: Section 2 — "MARITAL STATUS: SINGLE [ ] MARRIED [ ] WIDOWED [ ] DIVORCED [ ] SEPARATED [ ] OTHER [ ]"

fields.name: mailingAddressStreet
fields.label: Mailing Address (If Different from Home Address): Street Name
fields.sourceRef: Section 2 — "MAILING ADDRESS (IF DIFFERENT FROM HOME ADDRESS)", line 1

fields.name: workOrLocalAddressZipCode
fields.label: Work or Local Address: Zip Code

fields.name: applicantSpecimenSignature
fields.label: Specimen Signature of Applicant
fields.description: A physical signature captured within a printed border box; the source's own printed note warns the form becomes void if the specimen signature touches the border.
fields.sourceRef: Section 2 — "Specimen Signature of Applicant" (N.B. This form will become void if the Specimen Signature touches the Border)

fields.name: guardianFirstName
fields.label: Parent/Legal Guardian: First Name
fields.description: Applicable only if the applicant is under 18 years of age, per this section's own printed heading. This schema does not compute age from dateOfBirth, so this section is left ungated (visibleWhen) rather than programmatically tied to dateOfBirth — consistent with this registry's standing practice of not fabricating a conditional link the source does not itself express via a checkbox or discriminator field.

fields.name: guardianRelationshipToApplicant
fields.label: Parent/Legal Guardian: Relationship to Applicant
fields.sourceRef: Section 3 — "Solemnly declare that I am the ___ (RELATIONSHIP) of the Applicant"

fields.name: guardianIdDateOfIssue
fields.label: Parent/Legal Guardian ID: Date of Issue

fields.name: recommenderFirstName
fields.label: Recommender: First Name
fields.description: To be completed by the Recommender only, per the source's own printed instruction — required for every applicant, not conditional.

fields.name: recommenderYearsKnownApplicant
fields.label: Number of Years Recommender Has Known the Applicant
fields.sourceRef: Section 4 — "Whom I have known personally for ___ years"

fields.name: recommenderFirmName
fields.label: Recommender's Firm/Organization: Name
fields.sourceRef: Section 4 — "NAME OF FIRM / ORGANIZATION AND ADDRESS", line 1

fields.name: recommenderFirmAddressStreet
fields.label: Recommender's Firm/Organization Address: Street Name
fields.sourceRef: Section 4 — "NAME OF FIRM / ORGANIZATION AND ADDRESS", line 2

fields.name: recommenderFirmAddressTownCity
fields.label: Recommender's Firm/Organization Address: Town/City
fields.sourceRef: Section 4 — "NAME OF FIRM / ORGANIZATION AND ADDRESS", line 3

fields.name: recommenderFirmAddressZipCode
fields.label: Recommender's Firm/Organization Address: Zip Code
fields.sourceRef: Section 4 — "NAME OF FIRM / ORGANIZATION AND ADDRESS", line 3

fields.name: recommenderFirmAddressCountry
fields.label: Recommender's Firm/Organization Address: Country
fields.sourceRef: Section 4 — "NAME OF FIRM / ORGANIZATION AND ADDRESS", line 3

fields.name: recommenderIdDpPassportNumber
fields.label: Recommender: I.D./D.P./Passport Number
fields.description: The recommender's own identity document number, used to identify the recommender making this declaration.

fields.name: citizenshipBasis
fields.label: Citizen of Trinidad and Tobago By
fields.description: Section 5's four lettered categories (A)-(D), with category (D) itself printing two separate checkboxes (Registration / Naturalisation) sharing one certificate-number/issue-date pair — modelled here as a single 5-value discriminator gating the certificate detail fields below.
fields.sourceRef: Section 5 — "(A) BIRTH [ ] / (B) DESCENT [ ] / (C) ADOPTION [ ] / (D) REGISTRATION [ ] / NATURALISATION [ ]"

fields.name: citizenOfAnotherCountry
fields.label: Are You Now or Have You Ever Been a Citizen of Any Country Other Than Trinidad and Tobago?
fields.sourceRef: Section 5 — "ARE YOU NOW OR HAVE YOU EVER BEEN A CITIZEN OF ANY COUNTRY OTHER THAN TRINIDAD AND TOBAGO? YES [ ] NO [ ]"

fields.name: otherCitizenship1Country
fields.label: Other Citizenship 1: Country
fields.description: The "if yes, please provide details below" table has exactly 3 rows; flattened here to otherCitizenship1..3, per this registry's bounded-repeating-group convention.

fields.name: everIssuedPassportOrTravelDocument
fields.label: Have You Applied for or Been Issued Any Trinidad and Tobago Passport(s) or Other Trinidad and Tobago Travel Documents?
fields.sourceRef: Section 6 — "Have you applied for or been issued any Trinidad and Tobago Passport(s) or other Trinidad and Tobago travel Documents? YES [ ] NO [ ]"

fields.name: previousPassport1Number
fields.label: Previous Passport 1: Number
fields.description: The passport-particulars table has exactly 3 rows; flattened here to previousPassport1..3, per this registry's bounded-repeating-group convention.

fields.name: reference1FirstName
fields.label: Reference 1: First Name
fields.description: Section 7 requires exactly two references who are not relatives and have known the applicant for at least three years — mandatory for every applicant, not conditional.

fields.name: reference1Address
fields.label: Reference 1: Home or Business Address (in Full)
fields.sourceRef: Section 7, (i) — "HOME ADDRESS or BUSINESS ADDRESS (IN FULL)"

fields.name: reference2Address
fields.label: Reference 2: Home or Business Address (in Full)
fields.sourceRef: Section 7, (ii) — "HOME ADDRESS or BUSINESS ADDRESS (IN FULL)"

fields.name: applicantIdOrPassportNumber
fields.label: Applicant: I.D./Passport Number
fields.description: The identity document the applicant presents when signing this declaration.

fields.name: applicantDeclarationSignature
fields.label: Signature (Declaration of Applicant)
fields.description: Distinct from the specimen signature captured in Section 2 — this is the applicant's signature on the final Section 8 declaration.

documents.label: Most Recently Issued Trinidad and Tobago Passport or Travel Document
documents.handling: Submit the most recently issued document, per the source's own printed instruction.
documents.sourceRef: Section 6 — "If YES, list in the Table provided and submit most recently issued document"

documents.label: Declaration of Applicant
documents.statement: I solemnly declare that: (i) I am a Trinidad and Tobago citizen. (ii) The statements made in this application are true. (iii) The photographs enclosed are a true likeness of me. (iv) I do not have a Trinidad and Tobago Passport other than the one(s) listed at section 6. (v) I know the recommender for at least three years; and (vi) I shall report to the Passport Office or the nearest Trinidad and Tobago Government Office any change in citizenship.

documents.label: Declaration of Recommender
documents.statement: I solemnly declare that I am a citizen of Trinidad and Tobago and to the best of my knowledge and belief, all statements made in this application form are true. I make this declaration from my knowledge of the applicant.
